seoTitle: Bevendale vs Beverly Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bevendale and Beverly Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bevendale vs Beverly Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bevendale and Beverly Hills.
heading: Bevendale vs Beverly Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bevendale, New South Wales and Beverly Hills, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bevendale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Beverly Hills (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bevendale or Beverly Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bevendale has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Beverly Hills scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bevendale scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Beverly Hills scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bevendale or Beverly Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bevendale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
